title: Oxymeris floribunda
taxonomy: Oxymeris floribunda is classified as a species of sea snail within the family Colubrariidae. It is a type of marine gastropod mollusk. This classification is based on its shell characteristics and biological features. The Colubrariidae family is part of the larger clade of Neogastropoda. Oxymeris floribunda is often found in tropical and subtropical oceanic environments.

Some studies suggest that Oxymeris floribunda may be used to treat various conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
